title: [MTR4] RČ Pack
description: Trains of the Rodani Čräntiži Network
body:
Trains from the Rodani Čräntiži Network, The Midpoint between Səlmārã and Mūñkranir. The nation is split amoung 2 Voltages. 25 kV in the west, and 12 kV in the East.

This Resourcem pack adds trains from the RČ Network.

Thank you Vitor2005 and cw_315 for the Class 68 (G448) Model, and Mark 5a (G Type). [Download the Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr4-british-rail-class-68)

Thank you dewon2301 for the N700 Model. [Download the Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-n700a-series-shinkansen)
